seoTitle: Glen Fergus vs Glen Innes — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Glen Fergus and Glen Innes. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Glen Fergus vs Glen Innes: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Glen Fergus and Glen Innes.
heading: Glen Fergus vs Glen Innes — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glen Fergus, New South Wales and Glen Innes, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glen Innes has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Glen Fergus (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glen Fergus or Glen Innes safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glen Fergus has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Glen Innes scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glen Fergus scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Glen Innes scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glen Fergus or Glen Innes?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glen Innes has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
